changelog: SMS poptracker update 0.4.0 to catchup to SMS-AP v0.5.1
Updated logic, mostly blue coin logic changes.
Plaza's burning pianta no longer requires 5 shines.
Various entrance logic changes, made a function for the standard entrance logic to make changes easier as well as for readability.
Added Nozzle Box checks: made a new file for nozzle box and similar misc checks, added pointers in init.lua, made new images for them, and added autotracking support for them.
Added unimplemented checks for the other nozzles and yoshi eggs for all areas except Airstrip, Plaza, Pinna, and Sirena since they weren't given any new checks.
Renamed and/or removed some functions from .lunarc.json and logic.lua
